title: Typed naming grammar (self-hosting, ns = dev)
description: The controlled vocabularies and composition grammars every named artifact in dev-factory decomposes into. gate-naming consumes this data to validate a name of a given class on write; a name that fails the grammar is a defect caught mechanically. The naming system is itself the cell ontology.fleet.naming — extending a vocab is an ontology revision recorded by a ledgered `regenerating` transition, never an ad-hoc coinage. Adapted from harness-forge's naming grammar (the vendored lattice kernel shares the layer/scope/maturity axes byte-for-byte); the tier/actor/operation vocabs are dev-factory's.
_block_note: The `block` vocabulary is the closed set {ticket, activity, roadmap, lattice, frontier, cell, signal, kit} unioned with every `layer` value; gate-naming computes it. (NB: `block`/`unblock` are also OPERATION verbs on a cell's condition flag — a distinct axis from the `block` object vocab; both are intentional.)

ticket_id.doc: tkt-01J9Z..., epic-01J9Z..., iss-01J9Z... — identity excludes lifecycle state

activity_id.doc: act-01J9Z... — a live span of agent work, finer-grained than a ticket

compound_skill.doc: lattice-management, ticket-orchestration, cell-engine, verification, regeneration, autonomy-governance, spec-author, kit-authoring — a self-contained capability bundle (a folder carrying its own agents/rubric/policy/methodologies/scripts/references); named by the capability it manages, kebab-case

hook_script.doc: gate-signal, gate-ticket-ready, gate-dispatch, gate-verifier, gate-ledger, gate-naming, propagate-staleness, emit-ledger

plugin.doc: dev-kernel, dev-kit-corpus, dev-kit-app, dev-server (the namespace `dev` never repeats inside members; tier is kernel|kit|server, with an optional -{family} suffix on kits)

critic_file.doc: critic-reward-hacking.md — the catalog reviewer prefix; load-bearing, since the trust-boundary gate keys on agents/critic-*.md

rules: Directories mirror enums byte-for-byte (singular): spec/, never specs/.
The namespace never repeats inside members (BEM scoping applied to plugins): dev-kernel ships cell-advance, not dev-cell-advance.
Identity excludes state: cell IDs carry layer.scope.slug and ticket IDs carry a ULID; maturity (cells) and lifecycle (tickets) are Properties, never encoded in identity.
Casing by class: kebab-case plugins/skills/agents; snake_case scripts/tools; PascalCase schema $ids; dot-separated cell-id axes; ULID ids.
Gateverbs carry the control species: gate-* denies a write, emit-* injects feedback, propagate-* cascades a graph effect.
New vocabulary atoms enter only by a ledgered `regenerating` transition on the naming cell — never an ad-hoc coinage at a call site.
